product.name: ArNeo Dirt Pro
product.familyDescriptorPl: Fluorescencyjne dzianiny hi-vis na odzież ostrzegawczą
product.familyDescriptorEn: Fluorescent hi-vis knits for safety wear
product.categorySourceGroup: High Visible Warp Knit Fabrics for Safety Jackets
product.titleDescriptor: Water and Oil Repellent High Visible Warp Knit Fabric
product.specLine: 150 g/m², 100% Polyester (PES), Water and Oil Repellent High Visible Warp Knit Fabric
descriptions: ArNeo Dirt Pro is 100% polyester, 150 g/m² warp knitted neon colored fabric for safety jackets with extra water and oil repellent function.
Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors. They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light.
As a result they shine more than other objects.
Water and oil repellent function.(EN ISO 14419)
Water and Oil Repellent High Visible Warp Knit Fabric
150 g/m², 100% Polyester (PES), Water and Oil Repellent High Visible Warp Knit Fabric
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Water and Oil Repellent | 4 | EN ISO 4920
